name: (Now in App Lab) I Expect You To Die: Home Sweet Home

reviews.review_description: I'm sorry the game was okay I probably give up  one star but yeah it just ain't good at all I've had cartoons better than this

Not “Free to play” micro transaction garbage.
This game is free. It is fun!

Very short. But a good demo of sorts to show friends wanting to try out mixed reality.

This game instructions are unclear at the start
For a sequel to the original 2 games I expect you to die and I expect you to die 2 it seems to think we have played them before

I downloaded it before purchasing I expect you to die 1 and still can’t figure out how to complete home edition

Even akanator cant guess how to play it
It does not work sitting or in a small room and you have to do room installation and setup just to play the game.
SOME PEOPLE DO NOT HAVE HUGE GAMING ROOM STO PLAY IT IN. I think I will stick to the first game which is still hard.

No hate towers the game and developers of the 3 games
Presently I enjoy the first game and am waited to complete it and move too the second but please make a feature or hint system like other games.

Thank you for understanding my opinion.


-Tylerontop750

The first time I launched the game, the first step of the escape room glitched and I had to shut it down to start over. I then relaunched and got past that first step just for another glitch to happen on the second step. This game isn’t very playable in its current state.

I dead can’t get out of the box it isn’t letting me and the walls kept glitching for first time users it’s confusing he tells me I’m colorblind and that’s it? How do I get out the box the button isn’t working and it won’t let me draw out things in my living room like wtf
I can’t get out of the box I’m doing the steps and it won’t work

CLEAR YOUR GUARDIAN HISTORY, 

Also this is awesome! I love the idea and I’m excited to see more mixed reality as it’s groundbreaking for vr.
So I have read what MOST of you said and I am debating downloading it :)
Can’t get out of the beginning. Push button it says to but nothing happens. No guidance to assist. Waste of memory space

reviews.review_title: Hello 👋 agents, here’s my chart below
reviews.review_description:
How long is the gameplay
A LIFETIME[❌]
Hours[❌]
Short ✅

Worth the money:
No ❌
YES, it’s free (duh) and I love getting games for free[✅]

How good are the Mechanics?
Stupid[❌]
Realistically good ✅

How good are the textures?
🤮 [❌]
Good ✅

I’d rate this game a 9.4/10 I would recommend 

Also don’t scroll agent

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, we're so glad to hear you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: I am short so I can’t get the button at the start

So after playing thru all the games and waiting for this one I realized that this game is more of a teaser for the next game because it was showing the new mechanics and the multiple ways to complete a level.
Took me a while to pass each level.  Thoroughly enjoyed it
I got out of the box but my hands keep disappearing and I don’t know how to get those robot wasps to stop and the items keep glitching out of bounds
I can't get out of the box lol
Hugh
I can’t press the booted at the start.
It's simple to short!!!
It is very bad about make a mall thingy it doesn’t work
Fun game but what is the code for the box thing at the end of the level
